textByHash.27b8fb8bacd7a207d44fe06be622db0963f19e7f: OH NO...JULIET HAS...DIED?.... Oooooohhhhhh....(sob), (sob).Juliet...my poor dead cousin!
textByHash.354e82265a6b5bc923920c1ac614a6693afea694: It's a shame about Juliet...but perhaps we can meet up later?
textByHash.3890ed56dbb1b77e3c7aff993357f54ba16e39d9: He always brings a tear to my eyes - tears of happiness at his foolish antics!
textByHash.3e12b68d0d634fa5c124f4cf6bc9705295fec85f: Ohhh good! I do hope Juliet will be pleased as well! That dashing young Romeo must be beside himself with excitement! Have you told him the good news yet?
textByHash.509cfc1a3aabba96673e72c85a812f4c0543ff32: Hi, I'm Phillipa, Juliet's cousin. I like to keep an eye on her, make sure that dashing young Romeo doesn't just steal her away under our plain old noses!
textByHash.5e552d904b4e3efc79ef9eedaf46f53c7ffea13e: Oh, hello again! How was I - do you think I was convincing?
textByHash.5f208c54cfcf31b9de954c78db5f26feebfd0c49: Right...yes...Ok, ok, I think I'm getting my motivation now. Ok, let's try this again!
textByHash.8df509610a30a742406c8a456c14a25532b7e180: Yes, I'm quite the actress! Good luck dear cousin!
textByHash.a7dc074ba492488e9f3d678a3a6951fa71c7645c: He'd do it, you know - he's ever so dashing, and cavalier, in a wet blanket sort of way.
textByHash.b156fd7137407afdb06c9be38a784e26db5e2711: Oh yeah...you might be right...ok, let's try again.
textByHash.ba06807e58f833d5de82ebd4172299ba9b121eae: And I'm sure Romeo is just the sort of jester to make her laugh out loud - hysterically you might say.
textByHash.c8a44a88a14cc0bb5395f3e804f475d00af2ffbd: Poor Juliet...make preparations for her body to be placed in the Crypt...
textByHash.c991af5f931f8ac4452e5cc877debc18506af16f: Oh, hello. Juliet has told me what you're doing for her and Romeo, and I have to say I'm very grateful to you. Juliet deserves a bit of happiness in her life.
textByHash.d23db936da852893cc313be4bd1e822718f6f100: Hello, I seem to be getting on really well with that dashing lovely dovely, Romeo. Pity about poor Juliet - she missed out there I reckon!
textByHash.d771ccccdc999e892a9e8238cc7ce77b8bb2593d: Good, good - you lucky thing, I can't wait to see the look on his face!
textByHash.dd89112c4698396b00b5d3c3d2eb646d8c7fbcd2: Well, that's a good question! Who knows where his head's at most of the time? In the clouds, most likely!
textByHash.eb16a9b051f850accc2fb6e09d7acb025ce8e873: But he's probably chasing the ladies who frequent Varrock market. He does like a bit of kiss chase, so I've heard!
